THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COG1, INC. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MARTEL & NABIEL PROMOTIONS, INC.
